===== local_chat_history L291-318 =====
   291	def local_chat_history(chat_id, current_ts, limit=50):
   292	    entries = []
   293	    try:
   294	        with open(LOG, "r") as f:
   295	            for line in f:
   296	                try:
   297	                    env = json.loads(line)
   298	                    b = json.loads(env.get("body", "{}"))
   299	                    if (b.get("conversation") or {}).get("id", "") != chat_id: continue
   300	                    if env.get("ts") == current_ts: continue
   301	                    entries.append({"t": env.get("ts", ""),
   302	                        "from": ((b.get("from") or {}).get("name") or "system"),
   303	                        "text": (b.get("text", "") or "")[:2000]})
   304	                except Exception: continue
   305	    except FileNotFoundError: pass
   306	    try:
   307	        with open(OUTBOUND) as f:
   308	            for ol in f:
   309	                try:
   310	                    o = json.loads(ol)
   311	                    if o.get("chat_id") != chat_id: continue
   312	                    entries.append({"t": o.get("ts", ""),
   313	                        "from": "Aixa's Assistant (me)",
   314	                        "text": (o.get("text", "") or "")[:2000]})
   315	                except Exception: continue
   316	    except FileNotFoundError: pass
   317	    entries.sort(key=lambda e: e.get("t", ""))
   318	    return entries[-limit:] if entries else []

===== build_prompt L321-336 =====
   321	def build_prompt(body, context):
   322	    user_text = strip_html(body.get("text", ""))
   323	    sender = (body.get("from") or {}).get("name") or "Aixa"
   324	    chat_id = (body.get("conversation") or {}).get("id", "")
   325	    bad_ctx = (not context) or all(
   326	        (not c.get("from") or c.get("from") == "?" or c.get("error")) for c in context)
   327	    if bad_ctx and chat_id: context = local_chat_history(chat_id, None, limit=25)
   328	    lines = []
   329	    for c in (context or [])[:25]:
   330	        t = strip_html(c.get("text", "") or "")
   331	        row = f"- {c.get('from', '?')}"
   332	        if t: row += f": {t[:1500]}"
   333	        lines.append(row)
   334	    ctx = "\n".join(lines) if lines else "(no prior context)"
   335	    sp = system_prompt()
   336	    return sp + f"\n\n--- Recent chat (oldest first) ---\n{ctx}\n\n--- New message from {sender} ---\n{user_text}\n\n--- Your reply (Teams markdown only) ---"

===== is_actionable L275-288 =====
   275	def is_actionable(body):
   276	    if body.get("type") != "message": return False
   277	    frm = body.get("from") or {}
   278	    if frm.get("id", "") == BOT_FROM_ID: return False
   279	    if frm.get("aadObjectId", "") not in (USER_AAD_ID, YOO_AAD_ID): return False
   280	    text = body.get("text", "") or ""
   281	    if not text.strip(): return False
   282	    conv = body.get("conversation", {}) or {}
   283	    if conv.get("conversationType", "") == "personal": return True
   284	    for e in (body.get("entities") or []):
   285	        if e.get("type") == "mention":
   286	            m = e.get("mentioned") or {}
   287	            if m.get("id", "") == BOT_FROM_ID: return True
   288	    return False
